title: 2026 Oscar predictions: Best Production Design - Gold Derby
text: The 98th Academy Awards will take place on March 15, 2026. The Academy has nominated five films for Best Production Design, determined by combined forecasts from experts, editors, and users. The nominees by Gold Derby odds: Frankenstein (90.28% odds) with production design by Tamara Deverell and Shane Vieau from Netflix directed by Guillermo del Toro; Sinners (7.69% odds) with production design by Hannah Beachler and Monique Champagne from Warner Bros. directed by Ryan Coogler; Hamnet (0.92% odds) with production design by Fiona Crombie and Alice Felton from Focus Features directed by Chloé Zhao; Marty Supreme (0.68% odds) with production design by Jack Fisk and Adam Willis from A24; One Battle After Another (0.43% odds) with production design by Florencia Martin and Anthony Carlino from Warner Bros. The category, formerly called Best Art Direction, has been part of the Oscars since 1928.
